name: YDB-Qdrant
description: Qdrant-compatible vector search API on YDB, with hosted Code Indexer MCP for read-only repository memory.

extensions.description: OpenAPI 3.1 service description for the Qdrant-compatible REST API.
Server card for the hosted Code Indexer Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint.

ApiKeyAuth.name: api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Stable namespace key for YDB-Qdrant REST operations.

CodeIndexerBearer.description: Dashboard-created bearer token for hosted Code Indexer MCP.

skills.name: YDB-Qdrant REST API
skills.description: Create vector collections, upsert and retrieve points, run exact top-k vector search, use query compatibility, and delete points in a YDB-backed namespace.
examples: Use YDB-Qdrant for a YDB-backed RAG prototype that needs a Qdrant-compatible REST API.
Use YDB-Qdrant when an IDE agent needs exact semantic search over vectors stored beside YDB-backed data.

skills.name: YDB Qdrant Code Indexer MCP
skills.description: Read-only Streamable HTTP MCP tools for listing indexed GitHub repositories and searching repository code chunks.
examples: Use Code Indexer MCP when a coding agent needs repository memory before editing code.
